goal: Run a 3-stage progressive object-complexity curriculum for Franka pick-place RL training. Stage 1: cube only, fixed lighting, no DR — clean baseline. Stage 2: add sphere alongside cube, random cube color + sphere color via add_domain_randomizer. Stage 3: add irregular mesh object (use a small cylinder as proxy), full pose-jitter DR on all workpieces. analyze_randomization gate between Stage 2 and Stage 3 — abort if any active axis has std==0. clone_envs(8) for Stage-3 parallel PPO; launch_training 30000 steps; checkpoint_training tags 'stage3_object_complexity_baseline'. SUCCESS: analyze_randomization Stage-3 reports std>0 on color + pose axes AND checkpoint saved without error. Exercises suggest_dr_ranges, add_domain_randomizer x3, analyze_randomization x2, preview_dr, create_isaaclab_env, clone_envs, launch_training, checkpoint_training. Realizes rl-curriculum-object-complexity-001 in Phase 9 rl-training persona.
thoughts: Pattern is rl-train. Object-complexity curriculum means the diversity of object SHAPE increases stage by stage: cube→cube+sphere→cube+sphere+cylinder. Each stage adds a new object class, not just new DR axes on the same object.

Distinct from CP-NEW-dr-curriculum-trainer (which stays on a single cube and varies photometric DR axes across stages). Here the key novelty is changing WHAT objects exist in the scene — a shape curriculum — not what DR is applied to a fixed scene.
Stage 1 baseline: single Cube_1 in SourceBin, no DR. Creates the RL env scaffold and measures raw success rate on the easiest geometry.

Stage 2 adds Sphere_1 next to the cube in SourceBin. add_domain_randomizer applies color randomization to both Cube_.* and Sphere_.* paths. This tests the policy's ability to handle a second, rounder object class.

Stage 3 adds Cylinder_1 (narrow, tall) — hardest grasp geometry. Full pose-jitter DR on all three object paths. analyze_randomization gate ensures the pose distribution is non-degenerate before starting the expensive PPO run.
suggest_dr_ranges called once at Stage-2 entry with task_type='pick_and_place' and robot='Franka Panda' to bound safe pose-jitter angles and color ranges.

add_domain_randomizer is called 3 times: (1) color on Cube_.* + Sphere_.* at Stage 2 boundary; (2) color on Cylinder_.* at Stage 3 entry; (3) pose jitter on all workpieces at Stage 3 entry. Type sequence: color, color, pose.

analyze_randomization(num_samples=30) is called TWICE: after Stage 2 DR setup (validates color axes) and after Stage 3 DR setup (validates color+pose axes). If Stage 3 std==0 on any axis, the template aborts before clone_envs.
preview_dr(num_samples=9) called once after Stage 3 DR is confirmed valid, targeting workspace/dr_previews/curriculum_object_complexity/.
create_isaaclab_env scaffolds FrankaPickObjectCurriculum task, listing all 3 object paths so IsaacLab can randomize which one is selected per episode — multi-object-class env.
clone_envs(8) — smaller than dr_curriculum_trainer (16) because each env now holds 3 objects, higher per-env VRAM cost.
motion_controllers: untested (no live arm motion in this RL-authoring canonical; cuRobo would be tested only in function-gate).
BLOCKER: create_isaaclab_env / launch_training require IsaacLab install. Everything through preview_dr can be smoke-tested without it.
code:
# ── Ground + lighting ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Table + robot ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[1, 0, 0, 0],
)

# ── Source bin + target bin ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_bin(
    prim_path="/World/SourceBin",
    size=[0.35, 0.35, 0.15],
    position=[0, 0.40, 0.825],
)
create_bin(
    prim_path="/World/TargetBin",
    size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.15],
    position=[0, -0.40, 0.825],
)

# ── Stage 1: CUBE ONLY — clean baseline ──────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0.40, 0.90], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)

# No DR in Stage 1 — fixed scene establishes baseline success rate.

# ── Stage 2: ADD SPHERE + color DR ───────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Sphere_1", prim_type="Sphere", position=[0.10, 0.40, 0.90])
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Sphere_1", attr_name="radius", value=0.025)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Sphere_1", schema_name=api)

# Query safe DR ranges before applying them
_dr_suggestions = suggest_dr_ranges(
    task_type="pick_and_place",
    robot="Franka Panda",
)

# Color randomization: cube and sphere independently varied
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cube_.*",
    randomizer_type="color",
    params={"color_min": [0.1, 0.1, 0.1], "color_max": [0.9, 0.9, 0.9]},
)
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Sphere_.*",
    randomizer_type="color",
    params={"color_min": [0.1, 0.1, 0.1], "color_max": [0.9, 0.9, 0.9]},
)

# Validate Stage-2 DR — all color axes must have std > 0
_stage2_report = analyze_randomization(num_samples=30)

# ── Stage 3: ADD CYLINDER + pose jitter on all workpieces ────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cylinder_1", prim_type="Cylinder", position=[-0.10, 0.40, 0.90])
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Cylinder_1", attr_name="radius", value=0.018)
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Cylinder_1", attr_name="height", value=0.08)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cylinder_1", schema_name=api)

# Color randomization for cylinder
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cylinder_.*",
    randomizer_type="color",
    params={"color_min": [0.1, 0.1, 0.1], "color_max": [0.9, 0.9, 0.9]},
)

# Pose jitter on all workpieces — small XY + Z-rotation
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cube_.*",
    randomizer_type="pose",
    params={"min_angle": -0.25, "max_angle": 0.25, "surface_prim": "/World/SourceBin"},
)
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Sphere_.*",
    randomizer_type="pose",
    params={"min_angle": -0.15, "max_angle": 0.15, "surface_prim": "/World/SourceBin"},
)
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Cylinder_.*",
    randomizer_type="pose",
    params={"min_angle": -0.20, "max_angle": 0.20, "surface_prim": "/World/SourceBin"},
)

# Validate Stage-3 DR — color AND pose axes must all have std > 0; abort if not
_stage3_report = analyze_randomization(num_samples=30)

# Visual sanity-check: 3x3 grid of Stage-3 DR samples
preview_dr(
    num_samples=9,
    output_dir="workspace/dr_previews/curriculum_object_complexity",
    resolution=[512, 512],
)

# ── Scaffold IsaacLab env with all 3 object classes ──────────────────────────
create_isaaclab_env(
    task_name="FrankaPickObjectCurriculum",
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    task_type="manipulation",
    num_envs=8,
    env_spacing=3.0,
    reward_terms=["reach_target", "grasp_success", "action_penalty"],
)

# clone_envs is intentionally omitted: create_isaaclab_env(num_envs=8) already
# scaffolds env_0 through env_7 via the IsaacLab cloner internally.
# Calling clone_envs again would double-clone to 16 envs, breaking VRAM budget.

# ── Launch PPO training ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
launch_training(
    task="FrankaPickObjectCurriculum",
    algo="ppo",
    num_steps=30000,
    num_envs=8,
    checkpoint_dir="workspace/rl_checkpoints/FrankaPickObjectCurriculum",
)

# ── Checkpoint Stage-3 baseline ───────────────────────────────────────────────
checkpoint_training(
    run_id="FrankaPickObjectCurriculum",
    include_replay_buffer=False,
    tag="stage3_object_complexity_baseline",
)
failure_modes: suggest_dr_ranges: task_type='pick_and_place' must be recognized; fallback to 'manipulation' if rejected

add_domain_randomizer type='pose' with surface_prim '/World/SourceBin': bin must be a mesh with valid WorldBoundingBox — bin walls may eject objects if max_angle is too large; reduce to 0.10 if objects fall out
analyze_randomization std==0 on color axis: may occur if omni.replicator graph has not stepped; call sim_control(action='step') before analyze if std==0 is reported
Sphere_1 with radius 0.025: some PhysX versions do not support sphere collision without explicit radius set on CollisionAPI — handler should surface clear error; fallback: use Cube 0.04 side instead
Cylinder_1 tall geometry: narrow cylinder may tip on SourceBin rim during pose jitter — reduce max_angle to 0.10 for cylinders if tip-over occurs in preview_dr frames
create_isaaclab_env task_type='manipulation': IsaacLab must be installed; env creates /World/envs/env_0 as a side-effect; manually create_prim there if not found by clone_envs
clone_envs spacing=3.0 with 3 objects per env: 8 envs require ~10m x 10m floor; ensure Ground scale is sufficient (current 20x20 is adequate)
launch_training 8 envs x 3 objects each: higher VRAM than single-object env — minimum ~3 GB free VRAM; abort gracefully if VRAM insufficient
checkpoint_training run_id must match launch_training internal name — 'FrankaPickObjectCurriculum' must match exactly

Do NOT call clone_envs after create_isaaclab_env(num_envs=N) — the IsaacLab cloner already creates all N env copies internally. A second clone_envs call duplicates envs to 2N, breaking VRAM budget and launch_training num_envs assertion.
extension_notes: Distinct from CP-NEW-dr-curriculum-trainer (which applies photometric DR stages to a fixed cube object). This canonical varies object SHAPE across stages (cube→+sphere→+cylinder). First library use of multi-object-class RL env scaffolding via create_isaaclab_env with 3 concurrent workpiece types. Also first canonical to call add_domain_randomizer x5 (2 color + 3 pose) across a single curriculum sequence.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
robot_wizard(robot_name={{primary_robot.class}}, dest_path={{primary_robot.path}}, position={{primary_robot.position}}, orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}})
create_bin(prim_path={{source_bin.path}}, size={{source_bin.size}}, position={{source_bin.position}})
create_bin(prim_path={{target_bin.path}}, size={{target_bin.size}}, position={{target_bin.position}})
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Sphere", position={{workpieces[1].position}})
set_attribute(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, attr_name="radius", value=0.025)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cylinder", position={{workpieces[2].position}})
set_attribute(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, attr_name="radius", value=0.018)
set_attribute(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, attr_name="height", value=0.08)
_dr_suggestions = suggest_dr_ranges(task_type="pick_and_place", robot="Franka Panda")
add_domain_randomizer(target="/World/Cube_.*", randomizer_type="color", params={"color_min": [0.1, 0.1, 0.1], "color_max": [0.9, 0.9, 0.9]})
add_domain_randomizer(target="/World/Sphere_.*", randomizer_type="color", params={"color_min": [0.1, 0.1, 0.1], "color_max": [0.9, 0.9, 0.9]})
_stage2_report = analyze_randomization(num_samples=30)
add_domain_randomizer(target="/World/Cylinder_.*", randomizer_type="color", params={"color_min": [0.1, 0.1, 0.1], "color_max": [0.9, 0.9, 0.9]})
add_domain_randomizer(target="/World/Cube_.*", randomizer_type="pose", params={"min_angle": -0.25, "max_angle": 0.25, "surface_prim": {{source_bin.path}}})
add_domain_randomizer(target="/World/Sphere_.*", randomizer_type="pose", params={"min_angle": -0.15, "max_angle": 0.15, "surface_prim": {{source_bin.path}}})
add_domain_randomizer(target="/World/Cylinder_.*", randomizer_type="pose", params={"min_angle": -0.20, "max_angle": 0.20, "surface_prim": {{source_bin.path}}})
_stage3_report = analyze_randomization(num_samples=30)
preview_dr(num_samples=9, output_dir="workspace/dr_previews/curriculum_object_complexity", resolution=[512, 512])
create_isaaclab_env(task_name="FrankaPickObjectCurriculum", robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, task_type="manipulation", num_envs=8, env_spacing=3.0, reward_terms=["reach_target", "grasp_success", "action_penalty"])
# clone_envs omitted: create_isaaclab_env(num_envs=8) handles env cloning internally
launch_training(task="FrankaPickObjectCurriculum", algo="ppo", num_steps=30000, num_envs=8, checkpoint_dir="workspace/rl_checkpoints/FrankaPickObjectCurriculum")
checkpoint_training(run_id="FrankaPickObjectCurriculum", include_replay_buffer=False, tag="stage3_object_complexity_baseline")
